subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast drawn nigh unto the spirit of Christ in the Kingdom of God! Verily the body is composed of physical elements
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المقبل الی روح المسیح فی ملکوت الله ان الجسد مرکب من عناصر جسمانیه و لابد
subcodes.subjects: @resurrection of Christ, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism, @material and spiritual existence; two books
